content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms like ICM and RND can be reframed as an endogenous active learning pruning system for 2024-2025 SOTA long-agent memory, where high-curiosity unexplored experiences are retained long-term while low-curiosity redundant observations are automatically compressed or discarded. This turns passive agent memory from a static storage problem into an autonomous curation system aligned with the agent’s own learning goals.
